per_turn_leaks.student_message: I know it can be scary to think about, but do you notice any sweating or feeling faint during these episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, I have been having night sweats, actually. It's like my body is just overheating and I wake up drenched in sweat every night.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: It must be frightening when symptoms like these happen. Any other areas of your body affected?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've also had some sharp pain on my right side when I breathe deeply or cough, and it's been bothering me a lot.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I can see this is taking a toll on you. How has your energy been? Your appetite?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My energy has been really low, to be honest. I've had trouble getting out of bed some days and even when I do get going, I feel exhausted soon after. As for my appetite, it's actually decreased a bit over the past week or so - I just haven't felt like eating as much as I normally would.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I don't want to pry, but understanding your lifestyle really helps me help you. How do you eat on a typical day?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've been eating pretty normally, but like I said, my appetite has decreased lately so I haven't been feeling as hungry as usual.
